steps.title: Check current grpc setup
steps.description:
Verify your grpc version:
gRPC library — check your language-specific package (e.g., pip show grpcio, npm ls @grpc/grpc-js)
This feature requires grpc as a dependency.

steps.title: Review grpc configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant grpc configuration:
Hi, I want to make grpc client and server code to work with gevent, is grpc compatible with gevent?

steps.title: Apply the fix for gevent compatibility
steps.description:
It's basically that. gRPC Python uses multiple threads for a server (e.g. one for the server receiving messages, one to pass the call data along to the application). These trip over each other when they don't cooperatively release polling to `gevent` (which at least one of them can't do because
```yaml
File "/Users/srinath.gs/.virtualenvs/vajra/lib/python2.7/site-packages/grpc/_channel.py", line 670, in channel_spin
    event = state.completion_queue.poll()
  File "src/python/grpcio/grpc/_cython/_cygrpc/completion_queue.pyx.pxi", line 105, in grpc._cython.cygrpc.CompletionQueue.poll (src/python/grpcio/grpc/_cython/cygrpc.c:9612)
KeyboardInterrupt
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "gevent compatibility" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: It's basically that. gRPC Python uses multiple threads for a server (e.g. one for the server receiving messages, one to pass the call data along to the application). These trip over each other when they don't cooperatively release polling to `gevent` (which at least one of them can't do because it's in gRPC core code and the core is obviously not based on `gevent`).
codeSnippets:
File "/Users/srinath.gs/.virtualenvs/vajra/lib/python2.7/site-packages/grpc/_channel.py", line 670, in channel_spin
    event = state.completion_queue.poll()
  File "src/python/grpcio/grpc/_cython/_cygrpc/completion_queue.pyx.pxi", line 105, in grpc._cython.cygrpc.CompletionQueue.poll (src/python/grpcio/grpc/_cython/cygrpc.c:9612)
KeyboardInterrupt

prerequisites.description: gRPC library — check your language-specific package (e.g., pip show grpcio, npm ls @grpc/grpc-js)
